narrative.headline: 2018 Chevy Traverse: power train trouble leads owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 446 complaints with NHTSA. Power train is by far the biggest concern at 42% of reports, followed by electrical issues at 22% and engine trouble at 19%. Brakes account for 8% but carry the most crashes (3), and fuel system rounds it out at 7%. No fires, injuries, or deaths were reported in any category.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: The top complaint area by a wide margin: 186 reports (42%), with 1 crash. Test how the car shifts and drives before buying.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 98 reports (22%), with 1 crash. Check that the electronics work as expected.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 83 reports (19%), with 1 crash. Listen for any engine warning or rough running on a test drive.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Fewer reports at 36 (8%), but with 3 crashes it has the highest crash count of any area. Inspect the brakes carefully.

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: The smallest group: 29 reports (7%), with no crashes, injuries, or fires reported.
